headline: GameStop stock sinks after surprise eBay takeover bid, Cohen's combative CNBC interview
summary: GameStop made a takeover bid for eBay, offering $125 per share in a cash-and-stock deal that values the e-commerce platform at roughly $55.5 billion.

raw.headline: GameStop stock sinks after surprise eBay takeover bid, Cohen's combative CNBC interview
raw.summary: GameStop made a takeover bid for eBay, offering $125 per share in a cash-and-stock deal that values the e-commerce platform at roughly $55.5 billion.

headline: Amazon Just Made a Big Move. These 2 S&P 500 Stocks Are Next to Watch.
summary: More money in consumers' pockets could be good news for these retail stocks.
